name: Dashboard displays stats and daily quests after login
description: After logging in, the dashboard shows the user's XP total and coin balance in the stats row (Nora uses XP and coins, not a streak counter). Note: there is no onboarding tour for this established account.

planSteps.description: Log in with valid credentials and wait for the dashboard to finish loading
Verify the dashboard shows the XP value and the Coins value in the stats row. Seeing both numbers means PASS; a 404 or blank page means FAIL.
